ci._thresholds_note: Aligned with the post-Phase-1 baseline locked in AEO-Token-Conserving-Recap.md decision 5 (perf 88-89, a11y 93, bp 96, seo 100). Performance gap below 0.95 predates the AEO branch and is out of scope here per recap; raise this floor after a dedicated perf phase. Worst observed across 5 locales on the AEO branch: perf 0.83 (fr, de), a11y 0.93, bp 0.96, seo 1.00.
